visual_description: A man in a dark suit and tie stands in a dimly lit control room, holding a phone to his ear while wearing a headset. The camera cuts to a close-up of another man wearing headphones, looking down at a computer screen with a focused expression. A hand inserts a black USB LAN adapter into a laptop, pressing the "ACTIVE" button as the indicator lights up.
audio_description: A male voice is audible speaking into a phone. A hand inserts a USB device, producing a faint electronic click.
